experiments.title: Training Logs of OLMo2-0425-1B
experiments.summary: Public W&B report for OLMo2-0425-1B training logs. It is attached to the root as an external training-log reference only, not as OLMo-3 root provenance.
experiments.summary_zh: 公开 W&B 报告，内容为 OLMo2-0425-1B 训练日志。它只作为根节点的外部训练日志参考，不作为 OLMo-3 根节点 provenance。

evidence.label: W&B report
evidence.summary: The sanitized report URL is reachable without storing the private query parameter.

experiments.title: All-DD cumsum A/B submission
experiments.summary: A submission recipe exists, but no W&B run, final loss or result artifact is committed.
experiments.summary_zh: 已有提交配方，但尚未提交 W&B run、最终 loss 或结果 artifact。

evidence.label: Feature-local evidence
evidence.summary: The existing Feature record mentions the All-DD cumsum A/B submission as planned.
